title: Command Support
description: A small mod that adds air support that you can call in! (Creative Only)
body:
Command support is a small mod that adds a simple mechanic, Air strikes!

 

With this mod you can use flares, and a radio to call in airstrikes on your friends. This mod is meant to be used in a minigame environment as the items do not currently have a crafting recipe. You may add recipes if you wish but be warned, this mod is VERY op in survival and I would highly recommend you look at the loot table for the supply flare.

 

To use the mod, right click with a flare. After the flare is lit, right click with a radio while you are near to the flare. A bit after you will see a plane fly over and the strike will have been delivered.
